scripts.docker:build: bun run app:build && test -d apps/app/.next/standalone || (echo 'Build failed: .next/standalone not found' && exit 1) && podman-compose build
scripts.docker:deploy: bun run app:build && test -d apps/app/.next/standalone || (echo 'Build failed: .next/standalone not found' && exit 1) && podman-compose build && podman-compose up -d
